description_long: This helmet features a robust, futuristic design with a matte black finish and angular contours, giving it a tactical, high-tech appearance. The dome is smooth and rounded, with a reinforced lower face guard that extends downward, integrating seamlessly into the neck protection. Prominent orange accents and warning stripes are visible on the sides, along with a small metallic plate and a yellow hazard symbol on the front. The helmet includes side-mounted mechanical components and flexible tubing, suggesting advanced functionality or environmental protection. The rear view reveals dual hoses connecting the lower section to the back of the helmet, enhancing its armored, sci-fi aesthetic. The overall construction appears solid and protective, suitable for urban tactical or hazardous environments.
description: A matte black, futuristic helmet with angular contours, orange accents, and integrated tubing, designed for tactical or hazardous urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced face guard, metallic plate, yellow hazard symbol, and angular cheek panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the orange stripes, side-mounted tubing, and the hazard symbol on the upper side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays dual hoses connecting the lower helmet to the back, with a smooth, rounded dome and no visible graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view features the word 'AREA', orange stripes, and visible mechanical details similar to the left side.
attribute_brand_logo: A yellow hazard symbol (black X in a yellow square) is present on the upper left and right sides of the helmet; no commercial brand logo is visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Matte black with orange stripes, a yellow hazard symbol, and the word 'AREA' in white; design is minimalistic and industrial.
